stem: A public health study surveys 100 residents surveyed and observes 31 positive outcomes out of 100 (31.0%). Estimate the true vaccination coverage and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.31. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2278, 0.4063]. Point estimate: 0.317.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
